### Post by betkho on 2013-11-04
&#4315;&#4317;&#4306;&#4308;&#4321;&#4304;&#4314;&#4315;&#4308;&#4305;&#4312;&#4311;. &#4304;&#4320; &#4309;&#4312;&#4330;&#4312; &#4304;&#4315;&#4317;&#4332;&#4315;&#4308;&#4305;&#4321; &#4311;&#4323; &#4304;&#4320;&#4304; &#4304;&#4315;&#4304;&#4321; &#4309;&#4312;&#4316;&#4315;&#4308;, &#4315;&#4304;&#4306;&#4320;&#4304;&#4315; &#4315;&#4304;&#4312;&#4316;&#4330; &#4307;&#4304;&#4309;&#4332;&#4308;&#4320;.

&#4307;&#4304;&#4309;&#4304;&#4327;&#4308;&#4316;&#4308; &#4323;&#4305;&#4323;&#4316;&#4322;&#4323; 12.04
&#4315;&#4304;&#4325;&#4309;&#4321; &#4321;&#4304;&#4323;&#4316;&#4307;&#4313;&#4304;&#4320;&#4322;&#4304;  M-Audio Fast Track Ultra, &#4320;&#4317;&#4315;&#4308;&#4314;&#4321;&#4304;&#4330; &#4314;&#4312;&#4316;&#4323;&#4325;&#4321;&#4312; &#4304;&#4326;&#4312;&#4325;&#4309;&#4304;&#4315;&#4321;, &#4315;&#4304;&#4306;&#4320;&#4304;&#4315; &#4304;&#4326;&#4312;&#4325;&#4309;&#4304;&#4315;&#4321; &#4315;&#4334;&#4317;&#4314;&#4317;&#4307; &#4320;&#4317;&#4306;&#4317;&#4320;&#4330; 5.1 &#4315;&#4317;&#4332;&#4327;&#4317;&#4305;&#4312;&#4314;&#4317;&#4305;&#4304;&#4321;, &#4320;&#4317;&#4315;&#4308;&#4314;&#4312;&#4330; &#4308;&#4321; &#4320;&#4308;&#4304;&#4314;&#4323;&#4320;&#4304;&#4307; &#4304;&#4320; &#4304;&#4320;&#4312;&#4321;. 
&#4304;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321; &#4306;&#4304;&#4315;&#4317;, &#4334;&#4315;&#4304; &#4312;&#4321;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321; &#4308;&#4325;&#4317;&#4328;&#4312;, &#4320;&#4304;&#4307;&#4306;&#4304;&#4316; &#4315;&#4304;&#4320;&#4322;&#4317; &#4330;&#4308;&#4316;&#4322;&#4320;&#4321; &#4307;&#4304; &#4324;&#4320;&#4317;&#4316;&#4322;&#4321; &#4315;&#4304;&#4321;&#4315;&#4308;&#4316;&#4312;&#4316;&#4308;&#4305;&#4321;, &#4334;&#4317;&#4314;&#4317;&#4307; &#4314;&#4308;&#4324;-&#4320;&#4304;&#4312;&#4311; &#4304;&#4320; &#4312;&#4321;&#4315;&#4312;&#4321;. &#4307;&#4304;&#4309;&#4323;&#4332;&#4312;&#4308;-&#4304;&#4309;&#4323;&#4332;&#4312;&#4308; &#4313;&#4317;&#4316;&#4322;&#4320;&#4317;&#4314; &#4318;&#4304;&#4316;&#4308;&#4314;&#4328;&#4312;, &#4335;&#4308;&#4313;&#4312; &#4307;&#4304;&#4309;&#4304;&#4327;&#4308;&#4316;&#4308;, &#4315;&#4304;&#4306;&#4320;&#4304;&#4315; &#4304;&#4320;&#4304;&#4324;&#4308;&#4320;&#4315;&#4304; &#4323;&#4328;&#4309;&#4308;&#4314;&#4304;. &#4304;&#4315; &#4335;&#4308;&#4313;&#4312;&#4321; &#4307;&#4304;&#4316;&#4312;&#4328;&#4316;&#4323;&#4314;&#4308;&#4305;&#4304;&#4330; &#4309;&#4308;&#4320; &#4306;&#4304;&#4309;&#4312;&#4306;&#4308; &#4313;&#4304;&#4320;&#4306;&#4304;&#4307; &#4308;&#4322;&#4327;&#4317;&#4305;&#4304;.
